description: Style noteA belt is an essential detail to complete your ensemble and this slim belt from baggit is made of textured synthetic leather for optimal style and durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, cinch this fashionable belt over a silk dress or wrap it around those stylish skinnies!Product DetailsMade of synthetic leather for durability and styleTextured upper Tang clasp to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner to maintain belt quality if necessary
